description_long: This is a modern bed with a deep blue upholstered frame and a prominent rectangular headboard. The bedding features a vibrant, detailed print depicting a lush, green riverside cityscape with bridges, buildings, and a sandy beach, giving the bed a unique and artistic appearance. The comforter drapes over the sides, partially covering the white mattress beneath. The bed frame is low and solid, with clean, straight lines and no visible legs, suggesting a platform design. The headboard is tall and padded, providing both comfort and a bold visual anchor. The overall look is contemporary, with the bedding serving as a striking focal point.
description: A modern blue platform bed with a tall padded headboard and a comforter featuring a vivid riverside cityscape print. The bed has a clean, contemporary design with a visually striking bedding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall blue headboard and the full cityscape print on the comforter, with the beach and river scene most visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the blue frame, and the comforter draping over the edge, with the cityscape print continuing along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain blue headboard and frame, with minimal bedding visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the comforter draped over the edge and the continuation of the cityscape print, with the headboard and mattress in profile.
